brand_identity.name: NexusMeet
brand_identity.description: A high-performance booking system that values time and clarity above all else.

typography.installation: Import 'Outfit' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css

rules: Widgets: h-full w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 shadow-sm

cards.classes: bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all hover:shadow-md

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-primary
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.available: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.occupied: bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border border-rose-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.maintenance: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

glassmorphism.modals: bg-white/90 dark:bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-2xl

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all forms use 'react-hook-form' with 'zod' validation.
Implement a 'DashboardLayout' component that handles the sidebar and header state.
For the 'Calendar' view, use a custom grid implementation or a lightweight library like 'react-big-calendar' customized with Tailwind classes.
Admin dashboard must distinguish itself from User dashboard via more data-dense widgets.
DO NOT use gradients for text. Keep text solid for maximum readability.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use left-align for forms and data.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Avoid default 'SaaS Blue' where possible; use the defined 'Deep Slate' and 'Electric Blue' palette.
Dark mode should not be pitch black (#000000), use slate-950 (#020617).
